about.title: About XIMA
about.subtitle: Revolutionizing professional development through AI-powered psychometric analysis

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To democratize access to professional development by providing personalized insights and expert mentorship to every professional, regardless of their background or career stage.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A world where every professional can unlock their full potential through data-driven insights and meaningful mentorship connections.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Leveraging cutting-edge AI and psychometric research

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Making professional development available to everyone

accuracy.description: Providing precise, actionable insights you can trust

communication.description: Your effectiveness in conveying ideas and building relationships

knowledge.description: Your depth of expertise and continuous learning capability

creativity.name: Creativity
creativity.description: Your innovative thinking and ability to generate novel solutions

drive.name: Drive
drive.description: Your motivation, persistence, and goal-oriented behavior
